title: Would be real nice if we had bash completions for this.

comments.body: easy feasible with the library skopeo is using to implement a CLI, I'll defer this till we have inspect|layer commands
Looked into this a bit when doing the `--help` cleanup, it was more than a 10-minute job.  So, sharing WIP #154 merely as a starting point, open to anyone finishing it or taking it over.
here to help.. I'll finish it.  @mtrmac I think you meant #155.  Cheers.
